source: Sohn Hearts & Minds Australia 2021 — Stock pick: Coinbase (COIN) — Coinbase Cloud as the AWS of crypto / web3 infra
summary: Coinbase Cloud is the AWS of crypto — a foundational web3 infrastructure layer with 20-30 year compounding potential
summary_extended: Baker argues that Coinbase's primary long-term value driver is not its trading exchange but rather Coinbase Cloud, which he frames as the foundational infrastructure and developer tooling layer for web3 application development — the direct analogue to what AWS became for web2 cloud computing. He contends that programmable blockchains open a vastly larger and more disruptive design space than the prior decade's cloud, AI, and SaaS cycle, justifying a 20-30 year compounding horizon for the thesis. The investment implication is a long position in COIN as a high-conviction, single-stock pick presented at the Sohn Hearts & Minds conference, with the core bet being on Coinbase Cloud capturing developer mindshare and infrastructure spend across multiple blockchains rather than on near-term trading revenue. Baker explicitly de-emphasizes the exchange business as the primary value driver, instead positioning COIN as a picks-and-shovels infrastructure play on the entire web3 ecosystem.
detail: Baker's primary value driver for COIN is Coinbase Cloud, which he frames as the infrastructure and tooling layer for web3 application development across multiple blockchains. He draws an explicit analogy to AWS as the foundational cloud infrastructure layer for web2, arguing Coinbase Cloud will play the same role for web3. The 20-30 year horizon reflects his view that programmable blockchains open a much larger and more disruptive design space than the prior decade's cloud/AI/SaaS cycle.
confidence_evidence: Presented as single stock pick at Sohn conference; explicitly framed as long-term high-conviction; 20-30 year horizon stated; primary value driver identified as Coinbase Cloud rather than near-term trading
quote_fragment: Cloud is the infrastructure and tooling layer for web 3.0

ticker_audit.reasoning: Coinbase is the explicit and sole subject of this thesis — Baker's entire argument is about COIN's Coinbase Cloud division as the AWS of web3 infrastructure, and COIN was his single stock pick at the Sohn conference.
